intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再按中文电影线记忆：喜欢乡间旅行但怕迷路、上车请 conductor 提醒、坐前排看风景、发现只剩自己、车到终点、conductor 忘了提醒、车要返回、他决定继续坐。读的时候注意对话节奏，where to get off 和 I forgot to put you off 要慢一点。

sentences.text: I love travelling in the country, but I don't like losing my way.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：他喜欢乡间旅行，但不喜欢迷路。in the country 是乡间，losing my way 是迷路，but 后面要读出反差。

sentences.text: I went on an excursion recently, but my trip took me longer than I expected.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：最近他去了一次短途旅行，但比预想花得更久。excursion 慢读，took me longer than I expected 是整句核心。

sentences.text: 'I'm going to Woodford Green,' I said to the conductor as I got on the bus, 'but I don't know where it is.' 'I'll tell you where to get off.' answered the conductor.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：他一上车就告诉 conductor 自己要去 Woodford Green，但不知道在哪下车；conductor 答应提醒。Woodford Green 当作地名读，where to get off 要清楚。
focus_words: as I got on the bus

sentences.text: I sat in the front of the bus to get a good view of the countryside.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：他坐在车前面，为了好好看看乡间风景。to get a good view 表示目的，countryside 三部分读清楚。

sentences.text: After some time, the bus stopped. Looking round, I realized with a shock that I was the only passenger left on the bus.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：过了一会儿车停了，他环顾四周，震惊地发现车上只剩自己。Looking round 后稍停，only passenger left 是画面重点。

sentences.text: 'You'll have to get off here,' the conductor said. 'This is as far as we go.'
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：conductor 说你得在这里下车，因为车最远就到这里。as far as we go 表示路线终点，不是人走不动。

sentences.text: 'Is this Woodford Green?' I asked. 'Oh dear,' said the conductor suddenly. 'I forgot to put you off.'
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：他问这里是不是 Woodford Green，conductor 才突然想起忘了提醒他下车。I forgot to put you off 是这课重点，put you off 在这里不是让人讨厌。

sentences.text: 'It doesn't matter,' I said. 'I'll get off here.' 'We're going back now,' said the conductor. 'Well, in that case, I prefer to stay on the bus,' I answered.
sentences.focus_zh: 中文锚点：他先说没关系要下车，但听到车要返回，就决定继续坐。In that case 表示既然这样，prefer to stay 是新的选择。
